name: qualixar-os
title: Qualixar OS — The Universal OS for AI Agents
description: Complete agent operating system. Forge auto-designs multi-agent teams. 13 topologies. Skill marketplace. Cost routing. Judge pipeline. 24-tab dashboard. Compatible with OpenClaw, NemoClaw, DeerFlow, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen.
author: qualixar

install.claude-code: claude mcp add qualixar-os -- npx qualixar-os --mcp
